method_point_buy.rule: All Characteristic Points must be used in the design process

step_2_attributes.note: Calculate Action Points, Damage Modifier, Experience Modifier, Healing Rate, Hit Points, Initiative Bonus, Luck Points, Magic Points, Movement Rate from characteristics

step_3_culture.note: Customs and Native Tongue each gain +40% automatically

step_4_career.rule: Not all available skills need to be improved

step_5_bonus_points.hobby_skill: Choose one additional Professional Skill or Combat Style as hobby
step_5_bonus_points.rule: Points may only be applied to skills already learned via Culture or Career, except the hobby skill
